name: Renée Fleming
abstract: Renée Lynn Fleming (born February 14, 1959) is an American soprano and actress, known for performances in opera, concerts, recordings, theater, film, and at major public occasions. A recipient of the National Medal of Arts, Fleming has been nominated for 18 Grammy Awards and has won five times.

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: Renee Fleming’s going to do the Top 10 tomorrow... figure out what key she should sing them in... I’ll play flute... And we’ve all heard opera... It turns out to be exactly the opposite. She had a great sense of humor, very easy to work with... I had one of the songs in the wrong key. I brought my l
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Marian McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: I just have to follow this up, because somebody raved to me about her, and I have not heard her.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marian McPartland — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: Renee Fleming came into my dressing room... we had our little woodwind ensemble... Renee making sure that she could time them right.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023
